---
title: "Our paper on Cerebellar Morphologic Alterations in Schizophrenia and Bipolar Disorder was submitted to Biological Psychiatry"
date: '2026-03-05'
description: A paper spearheaded by Dr. Mahmoud Rashidi investigating cerebellar morphologic alterations in Schizophrenia and Bipolar Disorder was submitted to Biological Psychiatry Cognitive Neuroscience and Neuroimaging.
---
